allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -State Listen | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id \\$_.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Host \('Killed PID ' + \\$_.OwningProcess + ' on port ' + \\$_.LocalPort\) }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id \\$_.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Host \('Killed PID ' + \\$_.OwningProcess + ' on port 3001'\) }")

Bash(DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:root@localhost:5432/careeros" npx prisma migrate diff --from-migrations prisma/migrations --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --shadow-database-url "postgresql://postgres:root@localhost:5432/careeros")
